note: Curated acknowledgments. Edit this file to add people. Categories are rendered in the order listed. Keep it honest - only real contributions.

groups.title: Methodology contributors
groups.blurb: Proposed or refined the paradigms, scoring, or validity methods that make up a methodology version.

groups.title: Research & validation
groups.blurb: Helped with reliability, validity, or analysis of the instrument.

groups.title: Testers
groups.blurb: Boot-tested builds, found bugs, and shaped the experience early.

groups.title: Supporters
groups.blurb: Backed the project, hosted instances, or helped it reach the people it's for.
